---
title: "Absolute Position Example"
format: revealjs
---

## Absolute Positioning Demo

This slide demonstrates absolute positioning of elements.

![](https://placekitten.com/350/300){.absolute top=200 left=0 width="350" height="300"}

![](https://placekitten.com/450/250){.absolute top=50 right=50 width="450" height="250"}

## Autocomplete Demo

To try the autocomplete:

1. Type `{.absolute ` inside an image or div
2. Trigger autocomplete (Ctrl+Space or press space)
3. You'll see suggestions for: `top`, `bottom`, `left`, `right`, `width`, `height`

## Example Usage

```markdown
![image.png]{.absolute top=100 left=50 width="400"}

::: {.absolute bottom=0 right=0}
Content positioned at bottom-right
:::
```

## Units

Values can be specified in CSS units:

- `top=100` (pixels, default)
- `left="2em"` (em units)
- `width="50%"` (percentage)
